title: Mou Hitori no Alice
synopsis:
This story explores the life of Alice Liddell—the real-life inspiration behind Alice in Wonderland—to deliver a powerful message of empowerment and the journey to finding one’s true self.
Feeling lost in the shadow of her fictional double, Liddell embarks on a path of self-discovery through travel, art, and her bond with her family. It is a soul-stirring tale of a woman who confronts her "curse" and ultimately transforms it into a lifelong blessing.

(Source: Tokyo Animation)
